Joint Petition For Order Approving Mediation Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Aug-26-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Koplowitz appeared by zoom for and with Gloria Anderson by zoom.
Thomas Wrobel appeared by zoom for respondents.
Douglas Applegate appeared by zoom for Legacy Probate International.
Jerry Hauser appeared by zoom for and with Bruce Friedman by zoom.

Mr. Koplowitz stated that he thinks all of the heirs have been identified and all of their interests have been addressed. Mr. Hauser concurs. When asked if there were any objections, no one responded. The Joint Petition for Order Approving Mediation Settlement Agreement is under submission with the court's intent to grant. Further discussion was held regarding the pending motion under CCP 473B to set aside order for final distribution and the order to show most likely going off calendar. Status on withdrawal or dismissal of the motion under CCP 473B to set aside order for final distribution is set for October 23, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion Under Ccp Section 473b To Set Aside Order For Final Distribution And For Order For Partial Return Of Distributions To Heirs Of Predeceased Spouse
Off Calendar Apr-11-2024 Continued To Jul-31-24 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 204

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2024 Continued To Jul-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Edward Koplowitz, Esq., for and with Gloria Anderson, Personal Representative.
Thomas Wrobel, Esq., for Margaret, Kevin, and Catherine McNama, and Jackie Dwyer, Petitioners.
Amber Kim, Esq., for U.S. Specialty Insurance Company, Surety.
Douglas Applegate, Esq., for Objectors and Claimants.

At the outset, Mr. Koplowitz suggests continuing the subject matter for 60-75 days to allow the parties to attempt to resolve this matter via mediation or evidentiary hearing - he also suggests the court consider issuing a Breslin Order. Other counsel present offer their positions regarding Mr. Koplowitz' suggestion. The court orders the parties to mediate, in open court. After additional discussion, the court orders the following:

1) The Order to Show Cause is continued to Jul-17-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.
2) The Motion to Set Aside Order for Final Distribution currently set for May-01-2024 is continued to Jul-31-2024 at 2:00 p.m. in Department 204.
3) The Parties are to mediate by Jun-14-2024.

The court shall issue an order after hearing confirming the above.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Wong. Not Reported.
